title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: libnbd bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for libnbd is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Network Block Device (NBD) is a protocol for accessing Block Devices (hard disks and disk-like devices) over a Network. The libnbd is a userspace client library for writing NBD clients.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): unsanitized hostnames in nbd+ssh URIs allow remote execution [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-129311)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for libnbd is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Network Block Device (NBD) is a protocol for accessing Block Devices (hard disks and disk-like devices) over a Network. The libnbd is a userspace client library for writing NBD clients.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): unsanitized hostnames in nbd+ssh URIs allow remote execution [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-129311)
